programme.title: Corvette Summer
programme.desc: High school graduate Kenneth W Dantley Junior and Vanessa a hooker-in-training try to track down his custom-made newly-stolen Corvette

programme.title: License to Drive
programme.desc: A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite flunking his drivers test

programme.title: Speed Zone
programme.desc: Despite the polices preemptive strike the illegal coast-to-coast car race is still on with new drivers Its a race where fair play red lights stop signs police roadblocks and traffic rules in general have no validity

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joes latest scheme involves having the governor visit the Shady Rest for publicity

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Always on the lookout for a way to make money when Uncle Joe finds out the Shady Rest property is located on the border of two counties he decides there has to be a tourist attraction in that situation

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A married woman is into watching game shows She gets onto one which becomes a nightmare wherein if she answers correctly her husband dies She wins 1000000 then travels back in time warning herself to get rid of the money or else her husband will die

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An alcoholic reporter is inspired by a beautiful woman to find a good murder case no matter what

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A troubled investigator looks into the suicide of a priest in an abandoned convent

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Ambitious first-time film director Alex Nolan is having trouble eliciting a good and believable performance out of lovely but inexperienced lead actress Leda Bedell Alex decides to use unorthodox methods to coax more credible and effective acting from Leda for the crucial final scene of the horror movie theyre working on together

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick comes face to face with the vampire LaCroix and kills him But the serial murders continue and get personal when it is discovered that one of the victims was a friend of Nicks

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Two cousins Ryan Dallion and Micki Foster inherit an antiques shop from their uncle Together with his partner they must track down cursed objects that their devil-worshiping uncle had created The first object is a demonic killer doll

programme.title: Mchale 402
programme.desc: Mchale 402

programme.title: Mchale 403
programme.desc: Mchale 403

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer meets a family from N Carolina who have encountered truck problems en route to Oregon so Gomer puts them up in a blasting range cabin untill he has time to fix their truck

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds a young jungle boy on the island as well as a helium supply that the professor plans to use to get rescued with a makeshift hot-air balloon

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A gorilla steals Mrs Howells diamond brooch and while Mr Howell offers a reward to the other castaways for finding it the gorilla kidnaps Mrs Howell too

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpas innate honesty saves the day when a dishonest real estate speculator tries to buy five unproductive acres of the McCoys land for considerably less than its actual value

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa trades a date with Flora for a hound dog

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is tricked into returning to Orly County where hes quickly arrested and imprisoned by the unscrupulous Sheriff Lobo BJ and his fellow falsely accused prisoners plot a jailbreak and a mad dash for the county line

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Masquerading as German workers Hogan and the crew have made elaborate and foolproof plans to blow a German cannon factory sky-high - but their plan backfires when Newkirk winds up being drafted into the German army

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When an important Third Reich official wants to defect Hogan brings him to Stalag 13 - and convinces Col Klink that the fugitive is Adolf Hitler in disguisewho is trying to elude assassins by hiding at the camp

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandovals CVI is breaking down While Dr Belman tries to remove it before implanting a new one Sandoval escapes He wants to rescue his wife DeeDee

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After an eletrical explosion in his lab apparently kills Arcane our arch fiend finds himself on trial in a nightmarish comedy of his crimes against his victims

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: How will Swamp Thing deal with a man who has captured footage of him on film and the deadly creatures released into the swamp

programme.title: Space 1999

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The arrival of an old friend of Victoria and Toms causes trouble in the Valley due to the mans claim on a plot of land which has been earmarked as the location of a new dam

programme.title: Cheyenne

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The exact rendering of a map is duplicated in order to fool a female spy Its the second part of an overlay that details NATOs missile defense system

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. programme.desc: Hard Knocks 44 kicks off with an Amateur Title Fight between wrestler Justin Basra and John 'The Dragon' Nguyen. This is followed by pros Zach Snyder vs. Kolton Menzak. programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw causes dairy cows to stop producing milk so people will have to buy products from his store

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget travels to the Greek island of Thermos to stop MAD from stealing a secret formula that will transform lead into gold

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick and Scooter are stranded on an alien prehistoric planet

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill has Braxis create a weapon that can induce stars to go nova roasting all their planets and the Guardians must stop him before he can use it on the Sun

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian leads the ship and Jayce to where all time meets and one can see into the future After passing several secret tests that show his goodness and courage Jayce is allowed to see his future which shows his father being destroyed

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Audrics image is being projected from a body of water on a planet Jayce goes down to investigate even though Monster Minds are busy draining the water off Jayce meets the fish people the XHal and the Old One and they communicate by telepathy

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger
